\tzpentry{ID4388}{Quantum Potential Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4388 introduces Quantum Potential Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ U_p(T) = e^{-i \Hhat_{p}^{\mathrm{helix}} T / \hbar} \]
